repos.author: huggingface
repos.name: ml-intern
repos.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
repos.summary: Huggingface 开源项目，让 AI 自主阅读论文、训练模型并部署 ML 模型，定位为「机器学习实习生」，适合自动化 ML 工作流。

repos.author: zilliztech
repos.name: claude-context
repos.description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
repos.summary: Zilliz 出品的 Claude Code MCP 工具，将整个代码库作为上下文提供给编码 Agent，支持代码搜索与智能检索，适合大型代码库辅助编程场景。

repos.author: HKUDS
repos.name: RAG-Anything
repos.summary: 香港大学开源的全功能 RAG 框架，支持多模态内容检索与问答，适合构建企业级知识库和智能问答系统。

repos.author: Z4nzu
repos.name: hackingtool
repos.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
repos.summary: 集成了多种渗透测试与网络安全工具的综合黑客工具箱，涵盖信息收集、漏洞扫描、密码破解等功能，仅供合法安全测试使用。

repos.author: ruvnet
repos.name: RuView
repos.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
repos.summary: 利用商用 WiFi 信号实现实时人体姿态估计、生命体征监测和存在感知的开源项目，无需摄像头，保护隐私，适合智能家居和医疗监护场景。

repos.author: Anil-matcha
repos.name: Open-Generative-AI
repos.description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik, Krea, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
repos.summary: 开源 AI 生成工作室，集成 200+ 模型（Flux、Midjourney、Kling、Sora、Veo），无内容过滤、MIT 许可，支持自托管，适合追求创作自由度的用户。

repos.author: Alishahryar1
repos.name: free-claude-code
repos.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
repos.summary: 让用户可以在终端、VSCode 扩展或 Discord 中免费使用 Claude Code 的项目，参考 OpenClaw 的设计思路，降低 AI 编码工具的使用门槛。

repos.author: open-metadata
repos.name: OpenMetadata
repos.description: OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.
repos.summary: 统一元数据平台，整合数据发现、可观测性、治理能力，支持列级血缘追踪和团队协作，适合数据团队构建可信数据资产目录。

repos.author: microsoft
repos.name: ai-agents-for-beginners
repos.description: 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents
repos.summary: 微软出品的 AI Agent 入门课程，共 12 节，涵盖 Agent 基础概念、工具调用、记忆系统、多 Agent 协作等核心主题，适合开发者快速入门。

repos.author: PowerShell
repos.name: PowerShell
repos.summary: PowerShell 开源官方仓库，跨平台自动化和配置工具，支持 Windows、Linux、macOS，是系统管理和 DevOps 场景的标准工具之一。
